title: Yun Na
content:
Yun Na
 is the 
Ancient God
 Elder of the Dong Ling Sect which exists within the second flower amongst the 
Cave World
's Five Flowers Eight Doors within its core.

Contents

1

Appearance

2

Personality

3

Background

4

History

4.1

Book Seven

4.2

Book Ten

4.3

Book Eleven

5

Trivia

Appearance
[
]

She has black hair and attractive features.

Personality
[
]

Background
[
]

In the past, she was created by the 
Ancient Celestial Sovereign
 from a drop of 
Ye Mo
's heart blood. The Celestial Sovereign also created an 
Ancient Devil
 Elder  and an 
Ancient Demon
 Elder but they both died in their sleep due to the Cave World's core being closed for so long. 

History
[
]

Book Seven
[
]

She ordered 
Dong Lingtai
, the 
Xiang Family
's ancestor, to spare 
Wang Lin
 after she sensed that he was an Ancient God. 

Book Ten
[
]

After Wang Lin returned from the 
Outer Realm
, he went to 
Planet Dong Ling
 to get revenge on Dong Lingtai for almost killing him and causing irreparable damage to 
Li Muwan
's soul.

After he killed Dong Lingtai, a member of the Dong Ling Sect suddenly appeared through a portal and attempted to pass a death sentence upon him but was almost killed by a single punch from Wang Lin. He was spared by Wang Lin as he sensed the aura of the 7-star Ancient God from inside the portal.

Book Eleven
[
]

She sensed the aura of 
Ye Mo's Child
 when he appeared to fight Wang Lin while the latter guarded the 
Inner Realm
 with his 
Unnamed Wheel Formation
.

Afterwards, she gave Wang Lin her drop of Ye Mo's heart blood as he was the first to enter the Dong Ling Sect inside the second flower. Initially, she stated that it was due to her orders being so but she admitted that she wished to leave the Cave World and go to the 
Immortal Astral Continent
 and, thus, wanted Wang Lin to be strong enough to open the door.

Trivia
[
]

Xuan Luo notes that female Ancient Gods are extremely rare existences within his Dao Clan and considers making her Wang Lin's maid. This is regardless of her roots as well as her giving up her Ancient God powers to Wang Lin almost completely.
